NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER RE: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAGAWAT, JENNIFER
MEMO TO SET RETURNED TO PLTF; REQUIRES SIGNATURE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAGAWAT, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBIN, DONNA MACMURRAY, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 18 SYCAMORE ST, S.F. CA. $4,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,200.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS. SHALL AFTER DATE OF VACATING THE PREMISES, AT ALL TIMES, AND FOR A PERIOD OF 3 YEARS AFTER ENTRY OF JMT, STAY AT LEAST 100 YARDS AWAY FROM THE PLTF. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY'S FEES,DETS. SHALL VACATE THE PRE- MISES NOT LATER THAN 3:30PM ON 3/31/00, SEE JMT AT LEGNTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
